title: Set up Upstash QStash for background jobs and scheduled tasks
summary: Install @upstash/qstash, publish messages to API routes, verify webhook signatures on the receiver, and schedule recurring jobs with cron — all without a persistent server.
declaration: I will set up Upstash QStash for background jobs and scheduled tasks. QStash delivers HTTP messages to your API endpoints with retries, delay, and cron scheduling — no worker process needed. It is ideal for Next.js serverless deployments where you can't run a persistent queue worker.
